# UJG TR 2026.06 Design System Modeling Skill

Use this skill when modeling or reviewing Design System module terms for the UJG Technical Report 2026.06 snapshot.

## Source of truth

Use the dated Technical Report Design System module:

`https://ujg.specs.openuji.org/tr/2026.06/modules/design-system`

Do not silently use active ED Design System terms when the user asks for TR 2026.06.

## Scope

Design System guidance is module-specific. It depends on Graph and bridges through Surface.

Use this skill for token and theme references, design-system vocabulary discipline, semantic recipes, modes, and design binding expressed by TR 2026.06 terms.

## Boundaries

Do not put traversal, journey ownership, exits, target resolution, or runtime observations into Design System terms.

Use Graph for topology. Use Surface for structural surface contracts. Use Design System when the concept is genuinely about design-system semantics or design binding.

## Cross-skill awareness

Consult the Graph skill when a design-system decision changes topology or traversal. Consult the root modeling skill when the task spans multiple modules.
